problem id: 7ed809c8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1)

examples:
  11100000 -> 11000001
  01000011 -> 10000110
  11111110 -> 11111101
  11101011 -> 11010111
  01010111 -> 10101110
  00011000 -> 00110000
  00000110 -> 00001100
  10101010 -> 01010101

query: 01100000
predicted answer: 11000000
